stemHtml: Two aircraft are holding. Aircraft A is higher than B. Both need to descend. How does ATC maintain separation?

options.a: B gets a minimum descent rate; A gets a maximum descent rate.
options.b: B gets a minimum descent rate; A gets a minimum descent rate.
options.c: B gets an average descent rate; A gets a minimum descent rate.
options.d: B gets a maximum descent rate; A gets a minimum descent rate.
